title: Order Sync Pipeline Health (Drone Shop → CRM)
description: Monitors the cross-service order synchronization pipeline between Drone Shop and CRM Portal. Tracks sync success/failure rates, created/updated orders, and detects sync anomalies.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'SOC Application Logs') and message = 'External orders sync completed' | stats sum('orders.sync.created') as Created, sum('orders.sync.updated') as Updated, sum('orders.sync.failed') as Failed, count as SyncCycles by 'orders.sync.source' | eval FailRate = Failed / (Created + Updated + Failed) * 100 | sort -SyncCycles
falsepositives: Expected failures during Drone Shop maintenance windows
